problem id: 0b404f15
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  11101101 -> 11010110
  00001101 -> 10000000
  10100101 -> 01010000
  01000101 -> 00000010
  01111101 -> 10010010
  01110101 -> 00010010
  11101001 -> 10010100

query: 10101000
predicted answer: 00000100
